creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Tue, 05 Sep 2000 10:06:02 +0300, Maxim Sobolev wrote:

> Furthermore, there is a problem with PLIST, because the port tries
> to remove ${PREFIX}/share/locale/* directories, which usually may be
> shared among several installed ports, thus should be kept intact. The
> following patch is expected to solve those problems.

Are you sure that this applies to directories which are not specified in
/etc/mtree/BSD.local.dist?  If the directories have been populated by
other ports, surely they won't be deleted?

Ciao,
Sheldon.
